caption: A video tour showcases a modern open-concept living space featuring a kitchen and dining area. The scene begins in a dining area with a dark wooden table, red runner, and cream-colored upholstered chairs, with a glimpse of a living room and stairs in the background. The camera pans to the kitchen, revealing dark wood cabinetry, white countertops, and a breakfast bar with four brown leather barstools. A large stainless steel refrigerator and built-in ovens are integrated into the cabinetry. The view then shifts to a closer look at the kitchen's utility area, highlighting a white front-loading washing machine tucked under the counter next to a stainless steel sink. The final shot provides a wider view of this utility section, showing the tiling on the walls and a grey appliance positioned on the right. No people are present in any of the frames.
